name: IRIS
author: buzzer-re + contributors
description: IRIS reverse engineering companion for Binary Ninja.
longdescription: IRIS embeds an agentic LLM workflow into Binary Ninja with native tooling, skills, and an integrated chat sidebar. Supports multiple LLM providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Ollama) and MCP tool servers.

installinstructions.Darwin: Clone/symlink this repository into ~/Library/Application Support/Binary Ninja/plugins/iris
